About Me

The Person Behind The Code

A passionate developer from Ethiopia, bridging the gap between cutting-edge technology and real-world impact.

3+

Years of
Learning

⚡

25+ Skills

Mastered

I'm Abdurezak, a full-stack developer and AI engineer based in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. My journey began in 2023 when curiosity about technology turned into a full-blown passion for building software that solves real problems.

From crafting pixel-perfect UIs to architecting distributed backend systems and training machine learning models — I operate across the entire technology stack. I have a particular fascination with the intersection of artificial intelligence and network infrastructure.

My goal is to build products that are not just technically excellent, but genuinely useful to people. I'm now expanding my reach internationally, ready to collaborate with teams and clients who share a vision for impactful technology.

Clean Code

I believe great code is art — readable, efficient, maintainable.

My Work

Projects That Matter

Each project represents a unique challenge solved with thoughtful architecture and clean code.

2025
fullstack

Smart Network Monitoring Dashboard

Real-time network topology visualization with anomaly detection, alerting, and automated incident response for enterprise infrastructure.

fullstack

fullstack

My Journey

Experience & Timeline

From zero to building full-stack applications and AI systems — the journey that shaped who I am as a developer.

🚀
2023

Started Programming Journey

Dove deep into Python and web fundamentals. Built my first full-stack CRUD applications and fell in love with the craft of software engineering.

⚡
2024

Built Full Stack Applications

Mastered React, Django, and PostgreSQL. Delivered a University Management System and an E-Commerce platform — learning system design and scalability patterns along the way.

🧠
2025

AI Research & Advanced Projects

Ventured into machine learning, building an AI Healthcare Assistant using TensorFlow and NLP. Developed a Smart Network Monitoring Dashboard for enterprise infrastructure.

🌍
2026

Building International Freelance Career

Leveraging a diverse technical portfolio to attract global clients. Focused on high-impact AI-powered solutions, network engineering, and delivering world-class software products.

What I Offer

Services & Solutions

From concept to deployment — I provide end-to-end solutions that drive real business value.

🌐

Full Stack Web Development

End-to-end web applications built with modern frameworks like Next.js, React, Django, and Node.js — optimized for performance and scalability.

  • React / Next.js
  • Django / FastAPI
  • REST & GraphQL APIs
  • Cloud Deployment
🤖

AI & Machine Learning Solutions

Custom AI models, NLP pipelines, computer vision systems, and LLM-powered applications tailored to your business challenges.

  • Custom ML Models
  • NLP & Text AI
  • Computer Vision
  • LLM Integration
📱

Mobile App Development

Cross-platform mobile applications with native-like performance, beautiful UI, and seamless backend integration.

  • React Native
  • Cross-platform
  • Offline Support
  • Push Notifications
🎨

UI/UX Design

Pixel-perfect, user-centric design systems and prototypes that combine aesthetics with conversion-focused UX principles.

  • Figma Prototypes
  • Design Systems
  • Responsive Design
  • Accessibility
⚡

API Development

Robust, well-documented RESTful and GraphQL APIs with authentication, rate limiting, and comprehensive OpenAPI documentation.

  • REST & GraphQL
  • JWT Auth
  • Rate Limiting
  • OpenAPI Docs
🔌

Network Administration

Enterprise network design, configuration, monitoring, and security hardening using industry-leading Cisco and Linux tools.

  • Cisco Config
  • Network Monitoring
  • Security Hardening
  • VPN Setup
